ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction took place */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Buy or Sell) */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "amount_usd" REAL /* Equivalent amount in USD */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical transaction record */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* ID of the transaction being recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the historical transaction took place */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Buy or Sell) */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "amount_usd" REAL /* Equivalent amount in USD */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the historical record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being analyzed */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency being analyzed */,
  "buy_amount" REAL /* Total amount of cryptocurrency bought */,
  "sell_amount" REAL /* Total amount of cryptocurrency sold */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the transactions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
